Title: Successful transfer with valid data
Preconditions: User is logged in. Source account has sufficient balance. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Open Send Money page.
2. Select source account BG1234.
3. Select beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
4. Enter amount 100.00.
5. Select matching currency BGN.
6. Enter reference 'Rent payment'.
7. Submit.
Expected Result: Transfer is completed successfully. Source account is debited by 100.00 and confirmation screen displays a transaction reference.

Title: Transfer without reference
Preconditions: User is logged in. Source account has sufficient balance. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select source account BG1234 and beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
2. Enter amount 25.50.
3. Leave reference field empty.
4. Submit.
Expected Result: Transfer is successful. Empty reference is accepted. Confirmation screen is displayed.

Title: Amount equal to zero
Preconditions: User is logged in. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select source account BG1234 and beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
2. Enter amount 0.00.
3. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation message is displayed. Transfer is not submitted. No funds are deducted.

Title: Negative amount
Preconditions: User is logged in. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select source account BG1234 and beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
2. Enter amount -10.00.
3. Submit.
Expected Result: User cannot proceed. Validation error indicates that amount must be positive.

Title: Amount with more than two decimal places
Preconditions: User is logged in. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select source account BG1234 and beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
2. Enter amount 10.999.
3. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed because only two decimal places are allowed.

Title: Currency does not match source account
Preconditions: User has a EUR account. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select EUR account.
2. Try to select a different currency (USD) if possible.
3. Submit transfer.
Expected Result: System prevents currency mismatch either by locking the field or by showing a validation error. Transfer is not processed.

Title: Reference at maximum allowed length
Preconditions: User is logged in. Source account has sufficient balance. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Enter valid transfer details.
2. Enter a reference: 'RentForApartment1234567890123456789' (exactly 35 characters).
3. Submit.
Expected Result: Transfer is completed successfully. Reference is accepted and preserved.

Title: Reference exceeds maximum length
Preconditions: User is logged in. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Enter valid transfer details.
2. Enter a reference: 'RentForApartment12345678901234567890' (36 characters).
3. Submit.
Expected Result: User is prevented from entering more than 35 characters or receives a validation error when submitting.

Title: Reference contains special characters
Preconditions: User is logged in. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Enter valid transfer details.
2. Enter reference 'Invoice #123!'.
3. Submit.
Expected Result: Validation error is displayed because only letters, digits and spaces are allowed. Transfer is not submitted.

Title: Boundary case for minimum valid amount
Preconditions: User is logged in. Source account has sufficient balance. Beneficiary exists.
Steps:
1. Select source account BG1234 and beneficiary Ivan Petrov.
2. Enter amount 0.01.
3. Submit.
Expected Result: Transfer is completed successfully. Minimum valid amount is processed.
